commit.subject: LU-13814 osc: add brw flags to osc_extent
commit.message:
LU-13814 osc: add brw flags to osc_extent

We're going to move some flags to being on pages to being
associated with the OSC extent.

FIXME: This may not be necessary - examine carefully.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ic4679065bd73b5ee193dba421aa24dc916bcb9c6
